summary.en: Compute batches of dense f32 matrix products and return correct binary outputs as quickly as possible.
summary.zh: 批量计算稠密 f32 矩阵乘积，并尽快返回正确的二进制输出。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing private-benchmark/config.json. The evaluator prepare phase expands this private config into official inputs and expected outputs.
